goal: Ensure automatic review state comments point to generated issue status lists and quota timeouts explain why no new list exists.
assumptions: codex-auto-fix feedback comments render the issue status table when review input exists
workflow state comments are separate from codex-cli feedback comments
Gemini quota or timeout means no new review input was received
risks: Final clean or pending summaries can hide the issue table if they do not reference it
Timeout comments can look like skipped issue processing unless they explain that Gemini produced no new review
